summary: Comprehensive frontend-only smoke + integration testing of Akbar portfolio MVP via Playwright on the external preview URL. All required flows and data-testid contracts verified.

test_results.home_renders_all_sections: PASS (hero-section, about-section, tech-stack-section, timeline-section, contact-section all present)
test_results.floating_navbar_visible: PASS (floating-navbar, nav-brand, nav-overview, nav-projects, nav-contact, theme-toggle-button)
test_results.nav_projects_route: PASS (clicking nav-projects navigates to /projects and renders grid)
test_results.theme_toggle_persistence: PASS (toggles html class to 'light', stores 'akbar.portfolio.theme'='light' in localStorage, persists after reload)
test_results.achievement_cards: PASS (3 achievement-card-* rendered including '10+ Completed Projects')
test_results.projects_grid_5_cards: PASS (project-card-ai-emotion, coding-game, video-downloader, weather-ml, youtube-tools — each with image, github, demo buttons). NOTE: first card (ai-emotion) showed transient count=0 due to framer-motion stagger timing, but image/demo descendants resolved=1 and visually all 5 render correctly.
test_results.contact_form_submit: PASS (button text changes to 'Message sent' after submit)
test_results.footer_socials_tooltips: PASS (footer-social-github/linkedin/email present; .tip element rendered on hover)
test_results.particles_and_gradient_bg: PASS (animated background visible in screenshots, no broken assets)
test_results.mobile_375x800: PASS (floating-navbar visible, no horizontal overflow observed)
test_results.console_errors: NONE (no pageerror events captured during full flow)

critical_code_review_comments: Hero shows 'Open for new projects · 2025' badge — currently 2026, consider updating year (cosmetic).
Footer copyright string shows '© 2026' which is good; verify alignment with badge year.
Tech-stack section testid is 'tech-stack-section' (review request used 'tech-section'); both teams should align on the canonical name — actual implementation is fine and consistent within app.
First project card (ai-emotion) momentarily not queryable during framer-motion stagger; consider rendering project cards in a single batch (or reduce stagger) to avoid potential test flakiness.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend testid map: tech section uses 'tech-stack-section'; socials are duplicated as 'social-{id}' (Contact) and 'footer-social-{id}' (Footer); both naming variants exist. Theme localStorage key: 'akbar.portfolio.theme'. Project IDs: ai-emotion, coding-game, video-downloader, weather-ml, youtube-tools. All flows green on first iteration.
rca of the issue: No defects to RCA — all functional and visual acceptance criteria met.
